parameters.name: parent
parameters.label: Import Parent
parameters.description: Specify the import parent (eg. USD/FBX ) to search for the asset. When no is specified it will by default search in the first import parent in its path.

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.label: Geo Path
parameters.description: The geometry path from the imported file.

parameters.name: reload
parameters.label: Reload
parameters.description: Reloads the asset from the import parent.

parameters.name: comptang
parameters.label: Compute Tangents
parameters.description: A toggle to compute the tangents for this .

parameters.name: useparentanim
parameters.label: Use Parent Animation
parameters.description: A toggle to specify whether to use the parent animation controls or have a custom setting for this .

parameters.name: shiftanimationstart
parameters.label: Shift Animation Start
parameters.description: A toggle to specify whether to shift the animation to the start of animation indicated in the importing file.

parameters.name: sampleratemode
parameters.label: Sample Rate Mode
parameters.description: A menu to choose between the or use a custom sample rate.

parameters.name: samplerate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: It is used to specify the sample rate ( ) for the animation. This parameter is disabled by default and can be enabled once the Custom option is selected from the Menu.

parameters.name: playmode
parameters.label: Play Mode
parameters.description: A menu to specify the method used to play the animation.

parameters.name: initialize
parameters.label: Initialize
parameters.description: Resets the animation to its initial state.

parameters.name: start
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: Resets the animation to its initial state and starts playback.

parameters.name: cue
parameters.label: Cue
parameters.description: A toggle to jump to Cue when it is set to ON and it stays at that position. Only available when Play Mode is Sequential.

parameters.name: cuepulse
parameters.label: Cue Pulse
parameters.description: When pressed the animation jumps to the Cue and continues from that point.

parameters.name: cuepoint
parameters.label: Cue Point
parameters.description: Set any index in the animation as a point to jump to.

parameters.name: cuepointunit
parameters.label: Cue Point Unit
parameters.description: Specifies a unit type for Cue . Changing this will convert the previous unit to the selected unit.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: A toggle that makes the animation to play when it sets to ON. This Parameter is only available/enabled if the Sequential mode is selected from the Play Mode.

parameters.name: index
parameters.label: Index
parameters.description: This parameter explicitly sets the animation position when Play Mode is set to Specify Index. The units’ menu on the right lets you specify the index in the following units: Index, Frames, Seconds, an

parameters.name: indexunit
parameters.label: Index Unit
parameters.description: Specifies a unit type for Index. Changing this will convert the previous unit to the selected unit.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.label: Speed
parameters.description: This is a speed multiplier which only works when Play Mode is Sequential. A value of 1 is the default playback speed. A value of 2 is double speed, 0.5 is half speed and so on.

parameters.name: trim
parameters.label: Trim
parameters.description: A toggle to enable the Trim Start and Trim End parameters.

parameters.name: tstart
parameters.label: Trim Start
parameters.description: Sets an in point from the beginning of the animation, allowing you to trim the starting index of the animation. The units’ menu on the right let you specify this position by index, frames, seconds, or

parameters.name: tstartunit
parameters.label: Trim Start Unit
parameters.description: Specifies a unit type for Trim Start. Changing this will convert the previous unit to the selected unit.

parameters.name: tend
parameters.label: Trim End
parameters.description: Sets an end point from the end of the movie, allowing you to trim the ending index of the animation. The units’ menu on the right let you specify this position by index, frames, seconds, or fraction (

parameters.name: tendunit
parameters.label: Trim End Unit
parameters.description: Specifies a unit type for Trim End. Changing this will convert the previous unit to the selected unit.

parameters.name: textendleft
parameters.label: Extend Left
parameters.description: Determines how the parent handles animation positions that lie before the Trim Start position. For example, if Trim Start is set to 1, and the animation current index is -10, the Extend Left menu dete

parameters.name: textendright
parameters.label: Extend Right
parameters.description: Determines how the parent handles animation positions that lie after the Trim End position. For example, if Trim End is set to 20, and the animation current index is 25, the Extend Right menu determin
